subcodes.first_line: O My loved ones in that land! Blessed are ye and joy be unto you, inasmuch as ye have turned unto and won victory through the Cause of God and His Manifestation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اولیائی هناک طوبی لکم و نعیما لکم بما اقبلتم و فزتم بامر الله و ظهوره
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @the power of words; of speech
